ArtifactMetadata.Summary: Create fully-featured Login and Registration flow on volunteer page with eye toggle, forgot password, 5-second redirect, and volunteer dashboard.

Description: Replace volunteer/page.tsx with a comprehensive Login and Registration flow, containing show/hide password eyes, forgot password flows, 5-second countdown redirects, and a responsive Volunteer Candidate Profile Dashboard.
toolAction: Overwriting volunteer/page.tsx with login, registration, password eye, forgot password, and volunteer profile dashboard features
